## Document Type

- [ ] NES — NeelStack Engineering Standard
- [ ] LAW — Engineering Law
- [ ] ADR — Architecture Decision Record
- [ ] RFC — Request for Comments
- [ ] NSC — Checklist
- [ ] NST — Template

## Priority

- [ ] P1 — Blocking (needed before production)
- [ ] P2 — High (needed within 30 days)
- [ ] P3 — Normal (needed within 90 days)
- [ ] P4 — Low (nice to have)
